name: Frontier Fudge
recipeInstructions:
Makes 5 pounds
1. In a 4-6 quart heavy metal saucepan, cook butter, evaporated milk, and sugar over medium-high heat until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Heat to boiling. Turn off the heat, cover, and continue boiling for 5 minutes without stirring.
3. Turn the heat to low, then stir in marshmallows until dissolved.
4. Add each type of chocolate in turn, stirring until melted.
5. Stir in vanilla and nuts.
6. Pour into a lightly buttered 9x13-inch pan.
7. Let stand until firm, about 8-10 hours, before cutting.
Creme de Colorado Cookbook (1987) From the collection of Jim Vorheis
